income_group: World Bank income group (High / Upper-middle / Lower-middle / Low income)
genai_adoption_rate_pct: % of adults using ≥1 GenAI tool regularly
productivity_gain_pct: Estimated national productivity gain from GenAI (%)
job_displacement_pct: % of workforce with high GenAI displacement risk
job_creation_pct: % of new job roles created by GenAI economy
net_job_impact_pct: Net job impact: creation minus displacement (%)
vc_investment_mn_usd: VC investment in GenAI startups (USD millions)
has_national_ai_strategy: Binary: country has published national AI strategy
copyright_clarity_score: Legal clarity of copyright re: AI-generated content (0–100)
ai_liability_framework_exists: Binary: legal liability framework for AI harms exists
mandatory_ai_disclosure_law: Binary: AI-generated content disclosure required by law
k12_ai_curriculum_exists: Binary: AI topics in K-12 national curriculum
gpu_compute_per_1k_usd: Available GPU compute per $1,000 GDP (relative measure)
mobile_ai_penetration_pct: GenAI tool usage via mobile devices (%)
ai_anxiety_index: Public anxiety about AI impact (0–100; higher = more anxious)
genai_used_in_elections: Binary: evidence of GenAI use in electoral campaigns/interference
public_debate_maturity_score: Maturity of public discourse on AI ethics (0–100)
native_lang_llm_support: Binary: major LLMs support the country's primary language
low_resource_language_country: Binary: primary language is low-resource for NLP
gender_ai_gap_score: Gender gap in AI access and usage (0–60; higher = worse)
rural_urban_ai_gap_score: Rural vs urban AI access disparity (0–90)
global_genai_index_score: GAAII composite score (0–100) — overall GenAI readiness index
